response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his resume overstates seniority, lacks clear evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and AWS
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and open-source tools
Demonstrated ability to learn and integrate diverse technologies quickly
concerns: No clear evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience as required
German language skills are basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
Resume overstates seniority (e.g., 'Staff Software Engineer') with inconsistent job timelines
